rationales.hook_strength: 'Ultimate looksmax' is a native, specific hook with a contrarian payoff (trainable, not genetic) — but 'ultimate' edges toward hype.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is one tight, actionable idea with a clear label and a single concrete cue.
rationales.audience_fit: Squarely aimed at appearance-motivated 20–35s; the looksmax framing lands, though it skews male and may miss a chunk of the audience.
rationales.novelty: Lateral raises, posture, V-taper — solid fundamentals, but anyone who's watched a fitness reel has heard all five of these beats before.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and direct, claims are appropriately hedged ('slow but real', 'months of consistency'), and the CTA connects training to the Health Score naturally — no AI-cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: Strong saves from looksmax-curious viewers, but the well-worn advice angles limit share potential versus a truly fresh take.
